prerequisites.value: Dex 13, Int 13, Exotic Weapon Proficiency (crescent blade).

description.value:
**Benefit:** You do not take a penalty on attack rolls when wielding a crescent blade. Additionally, you treat crescent blades as if they had the disarm and trip qualities. (See page 20 for details on crescent blades.)

**Normal:** Crescent blades impose a â2 penalty on attack rolls.
